type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
Globally Owens Corning is committed to reducing waste to landfill by 90% by ì
the year 2000,  based on a base year of 1987.  The Scarborough facilityis ì
one of the leading facilities toward acheving this goal,  with a 63% ì
reduction to year end 1997.
